description: Nick from the Solana Foundation Devrel team discusses the latest updates from the Solana ecosystem, including the ongoing Breakpoint event in Amsterdam, new developments in runtime v2, and the upcoming web3.js release candidate. He highlights presentations by Steven Lucher and Noah Prince, focusing on significant engineering achievements and new features in the Solana platform.
topic_summary: Updates from Solana's Breakpoint event, including presentations on runtime v2, web3.js, and the migration of Helium to Solana. Discussion on recent commits and improvements in the Solana ecosystem, including confidential transfers and token collections.
